Bash(node -e "const r = require\('dotenv'\).config\(\); console.log\('ANTHROPIC_API_KEY value length:', \(r.parsed?.ANTHROPIC_API_KEY||''\).length\); console.log\('first 20 chars:', \(r.parsed?.ANTHROPIC_API_KEY||''\).substring\(0,20\)\)")
